findings.evidence: <main> at line 27 contains another <main> at line 28. Only one <main> landmark is valid per document.

findings.description: Flow Regime Tied to Ecology flowchart diagram is missing from the HTML conversion
findings.evidence: PDF page 10 contains a visual flowchart with boxes and connecting arrows showing 'Sound Ecological Environment' branching to Subsistence Flows, Base Flows, High Flow Pulses, and Overbank Flows, each with subordinate descriptions. The HTML renders this content only as nested bullet lists with no diagram image.

findings.description: Flow Scenario Examples line chart is missing from the HTML conversion
findings.evidence: PDF page 12 contains a detailed line chart titled 'Flow Scenario Examples' plotting four data series (Actual Flow, 80% of Previous Day, 80% of Weekly Average, 20/30/40 MAF) across dates 1/1 through 12/1 with y-axis up to 800. The HTML only lists the four legend items as bullet points with no chart image.

findings.description: Superscript footnote markers in the Cheoah River High Flow Events table are lost, creating data ambiguity
findings.evidence: PDF shows 'Var¹' (Var with superscript 1) and '600²' (600 with superscript 2) in the Magnitude columns, and '(cfs)³' in the header. HTML renders these as 'Var1', '6002', and '(cfs)3', merging the footnote markers into the data values. '6002' is particularly ambiguous as it could be misread as the number 6002 rather than 600 with footnote reference 2.

findings.description: The Flow Scenario Examples chart (PDF page 12) showing time-series flow data is missing from the HTML. Only the legend items (Actual Flow, 80% of Previous Day, 80% of Weekly Average, 20/30/40 MAF) are reproduced as a bullet list; the actual chart with plotted flow values over time (x-axis 1/1 through 12/1, y-axis 0-800) has no corresponding tag.
findings.evidence:
PDF page 12 contains a line chart titled 'Flow Scenario Examples' with four plotted flow time series. HTML section has

Flow Scenario Examples

followed only by a
    with four legend items and no tag.

findings.description: In the Cheoah River High Flow Events table, superscript footnote references are rendered inline, making them appear as part of the data values. '600' with superscript '2' (footnote reference) becomes '6002' which reads as the number six thousand two. Similarly, 'Var' with superscript '1' becomes 'Var1'.
findings.evidence: PDF March row Day 2 column shows '600' with a superscript '2' footnote marker; HTML renders it as '6002'. PDF February Day 2 column shows 'Var' with superscript '1'; HTML renders it as 'Var1'. These inline renderings change the apparent numeric values.
